title: Summarizing Meeting Transcripts
scenario: Given a meeting transcript of approximately 500 words, write a summary of no more than 150 words that captures the main points, action items, and decisions made during the meeting. The summary should be formatted with clear headings and bullet points.
constraints: Must include clear headings (e.g. 'Main Points', 'Action Items', 'Decisions')
Summary should be no more than 150 words

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary meets the word count and formatting requirements.
Verify that the summary accurately captures the main points of the meeting.
Check if the action items listed in the summary match the ones mentioned in the transcript.
Ensure the summary maintains a neutral tone and does not introduce any biases.
